name: help
description: Lists all available tools with descriptions and usage examples.

name: fetch_pbi
description: Retrieves title, acceptance criteria, and status of an Azure DevOps PBI.

params.id: The numeric PBI ID from Azure DevOps

name: pbi_test_sync
description: Full QA pipeline — fetches PBI context, syncs Test Plan, Suite, and Test Cases to Azure DevOps. Without test_cases it returns PBI details only. With test_cases it creates/updates the full plan.
usage: pbi_test_sync({ pbi_id: "18", test_cases: [...], plan_id: "123", mode: "merge_by_title", existing_suite_id: "456" })

params.test_cases: (optional, array) Test cases with title and steps. Omit to fetch PBI details only.
params.plan_id: (optional, string) Target plan ID for the PBI's requirement-based suite. If omitted, legacy behavior: auto-create or reuse a plan named 'Plan: <title>'.
params.mode: (optional, enum) One of: create_new_suite | append | replace | merge_by_title. Required when existing_suite_id is set.
params.existing_suite_id: (optional, string) Existing suite to operate on. Required for append, replace, or merge_by_title modes.

name: install_qa_skill
description: Installs the BEEF QA protocol as a Cursor project rule at <project_path>/.cursor/rules/qa.mdc. Also cleans up stale duplicate .mdc files from both .cursor/rules/ and the legacy .cursor/skills/ location.

params.project_path: (string, required) Absolute path to the workspace root. The LLM must pass the active project's root directory.

name: validate_sync
description: Fetches a Test Plan from Azure and verifies all test cases landed with steps populated.

params.plan_id: The Azure DevOps Test Plan ID

name: plan_inspect
description: Fetches full test plan details directly by Plan ID — suites, all test cases with IDs and titles, and a direct Azure URL.

params.plan_id: The Azure DevOps Test Plan ID

name: delete
description: Permanently deletes work items by ID (any type). Accepts single ID, array, or range ('100-105'). Shows a preview when confirm is false. Soft-deletes to ADO recycle bin (14-day recovery).

params.ids: (string or array of strings, required) Single ID, comma-list, range, or array of IDs.
params.confirm: (boolean, required) Must be true to execute. When false, returns a preview.

name: pbi_preflight
description: Read-only. Discovers existing test suites for a PBI (new requirement-based and legacy static) and lists available plans. Drives the interactive tp workflow.

name: remove
description: Severs a connection between two work items. Pass child first, parent second. Auto-detects relation type; reports options when ambiguous.

params.child_id: (string, required) The work item being removed.
params.parent_id: (string, required) The container the child is being removed from.
params.relation_type: (string, optional) Internal relation name (e.g. 'System.LinkTypes.Related'). Only needed when the tool reports multiple matching relations.
params.confirm: (boolean, required) Must be true to execute.
